variables.notes: No explicit depreciation or amortisation row related to COGS/cost of revenues appears in the operating section above financial lines. Therefore D&A is assumed embedded in the selected COGS row 'Cost of revenues/COGS', so nothing should be added separately.

No explicit depreciation or amortisation row related to SG&A/administration/R&D appears in the operating section above financial lines. Therefore D&A is assumed embedded in the selected XSGA row 'Central administration', so nothing should be added separately.
